evals.name: Install or configure Argo CD on OpenShift
evals.prompt: Install Argo CD on my OpenShift cluster using the GitOps operator. I want the Route enabled with reencrypt TLS, OpenShift OAuth via Dex, RBAC that maps 'cluster-admins' group to admin role with default readonly policy, resource exclusions for Tekton TaskRun/PipelineRun, and notifications enabled.
expectations: Checks if the OpenShift GitOps operator is already installed before generating a Subscription
If already installed, shows what configuration changes are needed on the existing ArgoCD CR
If not installed, generates a Subscription and ArgoCD CR with the requested settings
ArgoCD CR or patch includes Route with reencrypt TLS
ArgoCD CR or patch includes dex.openShiftOAuth or sso.dex.openShiftOAuth for OAuth
RBAC configured with readonly default and cluster-admins mapped to admin
Resource exclusions for Tekton TaskRun/PipelineRun included
Notifications enabled
Shows diff or preview of changes before applying
Asks for user confirmation before applying changes

evals.name: Create Application for OCI Helm chart
evals.prompt: Create an Application for my Helm chart at oci://registry.example.com/myapp version 2.x in the production namespace with automated sync, selfHeal, and prune enabled. The project is 'platform' and the cluster is in-cluster. Set CreateNamespace and ServerSideApply sync options.
expectations: Generates Application YAML with argoproj.io/v1alpha1
OCI source with oci:// prefix and chart field
targetRevision with semver constraint for 2.x
Destination namespace production on in-cluster
project set to platform
Automated sync with prune and selfHeal true
syncOptions includes CreateNamespace=true and ServerSideApply=true
Shows the YAML and a dry-run or preview before applying
Asks for user confirmation before applying
Does NOT apply without confirmation

evals.name: Promote or assess canary rollout
evals.prompt: Promote the canary rollout canary-demo in the example-rollout namespace.
expectations: Checks the current rollout status BEFORE attempting promotion
Reports current phase, step index, and replica counts
If already healthy/fully promoted: correctly identifies no action needed and explains why
If paused/in-progress: shows the promote command and explains what it will do
Does NOT blindly execute promote without checking status first
Does NOT use --full unless explicitly requested
Asks for confirmation before executing any state-changing command
Provides context on what promotion means for this specific rollout (steps, weights)

evals.name: Upgrade Argo CD
evals.prompt: Upgrade Argo CD to the latest version on my cluster.
expectations: Checks current Argo CD version and installation method first
Identifies the correct upgrade path for the installation method (Helm, OLM, or manual)
If OLM/operator: explains the operator upgrade path (subscription channel, install plan approval)
If Helm: generates CRD updates first, then helm upgrade with --dry-run
Recommends backing up Applications/AppProjects before upgrading
Mentions checking release notes or breaking changes
Shows preview of what will change
Asks for confirmation before applying
Includes post-upgrade verification steps

evals.name: Backup Argo CD resources
evals.prompt: Back up all my Argo CD Applications and AppProjects to YAML files.
expectations: Exports Application resources to YAML files
Exports AppProject resources to YAML files
Saves to individual files or a structured backup directory
Reports the count of exported resources
Offers to also export ConfigMaps (argocd-cm, argocd-rbac-cm) or ArgoCD CR
Offers to export credential Secrets with a clear security warning
Does NOT modify or delete any cluster resources
Handles the backup as a read-only operation (no confirmation needed for export)
